question: Please list all the destinations of 1587. 1587 refers to op_carrier_fl_num = '1587'; destinations refers to dest
orig_question: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man. 3-D Man refers to superhero_name = '3-D Man'; superpowers refers to power_name
orig_masked: Please list all the [C31] of [V1]. [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]'; [C31] refers to [C31]; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: 1587 refers to op_carrier_fl_num = '1587'; destinations refers to dest
orig_evidence: 3-D Man refers to superhero_name = '3-D Man'; superpowers refers to power_name
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT dest FROM airlines WHERE op_carrier_fl_num = 1587
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'

question: How many books are published by Vintage?  published by Vintage refers to publisher_name = 'Vintage'
orig_question: How many superheroes are published by Marvel Comics?  published by Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
orig_masked: How many [T9] are [T7] by [V1]?  [T7] by [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C15]
evidence: published by Vintage refers to publisher_name = 'Vintage'
orig_evidence: published by Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.book_id) FROM book AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.publisher_id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Vintage'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: How many customers who choose statement of first name are 500?  Firstname = 'Aaron' refers to first name
orig_question: How many clients who choose statement of weekly issuance are Owner?  Frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' refers to weekly issuance
orig_masked: How many [T1] who choose [C4] are [V2]?  [C4] = '[V1]' refers to [C4]; [V1] is a value of the column [C4]; [V2] is a value of the column [C16]
orig_evidence: Frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' refers to weekly issuance
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.salesid) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN sales AS T2 ON T2.customerid = T1.customerid WHERE T1.firstname = 'Aaron' AND T2.quantity = 500
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T2.account_id = T1.account_id WHERE T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

question: List down at least five first names of English actors.  English refers to language.name = 'English'; first names refers to first_name;
orig_question: List down at least five superpowers of male superheroes.  male refers to gender = 'Male'; superpowers refers to power_name;
orig_masked: List down at least five [C31] of [V1] [T9].  [V1] refers to [C7] = '[V1]'; [C31] refers to [C31];; [V1] is a value of the column [C7]
evidence: English-language refers to name = 'English'; first names refers to first_name;
orig_evidence: male refers to gender = 'Male'; superpowers refers to power_name;
gold_sql: SELECT T3.first_name FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN actor AS T3 ON T3.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN language AS T4 ON T4.language_id = T1.language_id WHERE T4.name = 'English' LIMIT 5
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN gender AS T4 ON T4.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T4.gender = 'Male' LIMIT 5

question: Please list the competitor ids of all the competitor events with over 5 medals.  5 medals refers to COUNT(competitor_id) > 5
orig_question: Please list the full names of all the superheroes with over 15 super powers.  15 super powers refers to COUNT(full_name) > 15
orig_masked: Please list the [C20] of all the [T9] with over [V1] [C13].  [V1] [C13] refers to COUNT([C20]) > [V1]; [V1] is a value of the column [C13]
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT competitor_id FROM competitor_event GROUP BY competitor_id HAVING COUNT(medal_id) > 5
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id GROUP BY T1.full_name HAVING COUNT(T2.power_id) > 15

question: Please name one recipe whose total calories is the greatest. total calories is the greatest refers to MAX(calories)
orig_question: Please name one player whose overall strength is the greatest. overall strength is the greatest refers to MAX(overall_rating)
orig_masked: Please name one [T4] whose [C153] is the greatest. [C153] is the greatest refers to MAX([C153])
orig_evidence: overall strength is the greatest refers to MAX(overall_rating)
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.title FROM recipe AS t1 INNER JOIN nutrition AS t2 ON t1.recipe_id = t2.recipe_id WHERE t2.calories = ( SELECT MAX(calories) FROM nutrition)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.overall_rating = ( SELECT MAX(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes)

question: List the address, city and name of businesses with score beyond normal range. score beyond normal range refers to score > '80';
orig_question: List the patient ID, sex and birthday of patient with LDH beyond normal range. LDH beyond normal range refers to LDH > '500';
orig_masked: List the [C63], [C64] and [C59] of [T3] with [C36] beyond [C36]. [C36] beyond [C36] refers to [C36] > '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C36]
evidence: score beyond normal range refers to score > '80';
orig_evidence: LDH beyond normal range refers to LDH > '500';
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.address, T1.city, T1.name FROM businesses AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.score > 80
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH > 500

question: How many students who were enrolled in course 10 stay in year 2? year 2 appears in the column yearsinprogram, which refers to the yearsinprogram.
orig_question: How many clients who were born in 1920 stay in east Bohemia? East Bohemia appears in the column A3, which refers to the region.
orig_masked: How many [T3] who were [C9] in [V2] [C25] in [V1]? [V1] appears in the column [C25], which refers to the [C25].; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]; [V2] is a value of the column [C9]
evidence: year 2 appears in the column yearsinprogram, which refers to the yearsinprogram.
orig_evidence: East Bohemia appears in the column A3, which refers to the region.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.p_id) FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtby AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id WHERE T2.course_id = 10 AND T1.yearsinprogram = 'Year_2'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date) = '1920' AND T2.A3 = 'east Bohemia'

question: Which torrents has the highest totalsnatched? Indicate the id. highest totalsnatched refers to MAX(totalsnatched);
orig_question: Which player has the highest overall rating? Indicate the player's api id. highest overall rating refers to MAX(overall_rating);
orig_masked: Which [T5] has the highest [C153]? Indicate the [C155]. highest [C153] refers to MAX([C153]);
orig_evidence: highest overall rating refers to MAX(overall_rating);
gold_sql: SELECT id FROM torrents ORDER BY totalsnatched DESC LIMIT 1
orig_gold_sql: SELECT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes ORDER BY overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: Give the name of the Action games.  Action games refers to genre_name = 'Action'; name of game refers to game_name;
orig_question: Give the name of the alien superheroes.  alien superheroes refers to race = 'Alien'; name of superhero refers to superhero_name;

orig_evidence: alien superheroes refers to race = 'Alien'; name of superhero refers to superhero_name;
gold_sql: SELECT T1.game_name FROM game AS T1 INNER JOIN genre AS T2 ON T1.genre_id = T2.id WHERE T2.genre_name = 'Action'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Alien'
